reports.title: A1 & A6 — long session battery (30 s GPS)
reports.summary: Both phones on continuous RNZ recorder sessions with ~30 s GPS. A1 started at 100%; A6 assumed 75% from prior test.
notes: Battery % is reported by the native app about every 10 minutes on GPS or heartbeat samples.
A6 drain is much lower than A1 on the same ingest path — useful as a low-drain reference device.
Plan ~1 full day on A1 for 30 s GPS + background recording; A6 substantially longer.

reports.title: A1 & A6 — short morning test (~2.5 h, 30 s GPS)
reports.summary: Morning battery check after ~6:30 AM NZ start with 30 s update interval configured.
notes: Consistent with the longer session: A1 ~3.7–4 %/h, A6 ~1.5–2 %/h.

reports.title: GPS moving test — 30 s interval (A1 & A6)
reports.summary: Active recording windows show ~30 s median GPS spacing; full-session averages are diluted by idle/doze periods.

charts.title: Median GPS interval — active vs full session (seconds)

notes: 30 s GPS setting is working whenever the app is actively logging.
Long gaps (~4 min p90 on full session) are stationary / screen-off / doze, not upload failures.
Optional faster uploads (~2.5 s) on the phone use more battery; dashboard smooth map does not require it.

reports.title: H6 — morning drive & overlay smoothing
reports.summary: Car test for yellow predict-to-now overlay vs raw green fix; rowing vs car speed caps on dashboard.
notes: Green dot = raw fix; yellow = predict-to-now (max 2.5 s, distance cap).
Car mode allows larger prediction offset at highway speed without rowing cap.

reports.title: Postgres storage & historical retention
reports.summary: RNZ ingest stores samples in Neon Postgres; monitor shows usage against POSTGRES_STORAGE_LIMIT_MB (default 512 MB).

metrics.label: Per-sample fields
metrics.value: GPS, motion, HR, stroke, capsize, tilt, battery, heartbeat

notes: See live storage chart on this page (refreshed from production).
Delete old data from monitor Settings → data management when quota is high.

reports.title: Data usage & ingest rates
reports.summary: Typical phone upload rates and server load for fleet monitoring at 30 s GPS.
notes: 270 devices @ 0.5 Hz ≈ 135 samples/s peak — see cost estimate notes in rowing_app docs.
Traccar overlay can switch source: Traccar (default) or Recorder (RNZ/KRI) in hub Settings.
